meeting_title: Voxel Training- Summit Span Solutions, Northpoint Site

safety_use_cases.label: PIT stop compliance at door intersections
safety_use_cases.description: Detect and review no-stop-at-the-door intersection events and use suggested actions to train or retrain operators on stopping requirements.

evidence.quote: It looks like this incident's a no-stop-at-the-door intersection.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: train slash retrain team on stopping requirements.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: we're going to capture things like ergonomic risk, pit-related safety, pedestrian prohibited zones to make sure that people are out of areas that they shouldn't be in,
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: No-pedestrian zone enforcement
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor and reduce pedestrians entering prohibited zones and use trends and peak times to focus interventions.

evidence.quote: Like if you look at a no-ped zone, no-pedestrian zone, for example, folks are not supposed to be in these designated areas.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: You have a high volume of events over the past month, but you're down 60-70% over the past about a month compared to the previous month.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So for you guys, for no-ped zones over the last month, that's been Tuesdays around 10 a.m.. East.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Ergonomic risk and overreaching detection
safety_use_cases.description: Identify ergonomic hazards like overreaching captured by Voxel to mitigate strain and injury risks.

evidence.quote: we're going to capture things like ergonomic risk, pit-related safety, pedestrian prohibited zones
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: overreaching, ergonomic risks, obstruction for certain areas, open door duration, parking duration.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Obstruction hazard detection in critical areas
safety_use_cases.description: Detect obstructions in specific areas to prevent safety hazards and maintain safe operations.

evidence.quote: overreaching, ergonomic risks, obstruction for certain areas, open door duration, parking duration.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Safety coaching via Actions workflow
safety_use_cases.description: Create, assign, and track actions with due dates to coach employees on safety incidents through to completion.

evidence.quote: go into our Create Actions workflow, and this is the more in-depth coaching platform that I told you we released about a month ago.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: We can also associate due dates with actions. So you can essentially make this a time-bound requirement.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Or they can drag and drop it to the completed column if it's, you know, finished and they don't need to do anything further.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Safety incident reporting and trend analysis
safety_use_cases.description: Use reports to analyze incident trends by type, camera, and time, track team engagement, and evaluate whether actions reduced incidents.

evidence.quote: And the time range defaults to the last full month, so in this case, November 1st to the 22nd.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Who's creating these actions? How many did they create? You know, how quickly do they complete them? The average completion time will be listed.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Incidence by camera, and then a little bit further at the bottom, incidence by time period.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: based off of that action, afterwards, you can gauge how effective was my coaching effort on this particular event, basically saying, after I did this, did this reduce the incidents that came in?
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Safety performance benchmarking and goal tracking
safety_use_cases.description: Set safety performance goals and compare ongoing trends against those goals as benchmarking capabilities mature.

evidence.quote: we are working toward more formal benchmarking capabilities so you can set goals and compare your trends against them over time.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>
